stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Jeppesen GSPRM Training Route Manual - Chart "E(LO)2".
A helicopter is flying from the offshore oil rig K5-D (53°41' 003°29'E) to De Kooy (EHKD, 52°55'N 004°47'E) airport. Due to bad weather conditions, the pilot wants to divert to a nearby airfield. Which frequency should the pilot monitor to receive meteorological information?
